resources.title: FFmpeg
resources.description: The Swiss-army tool for video/audio processing: remuxing, transcoding, filters, subtitles, and more.
resources.examples: Example: Convert MP4 to H.264/AAC, extract audio, burn subtitles, apply video filters.

resources.title: OpenAI Whisper (STT)
resources.description: Robust speech-to-text for many accents/languages; runs locally with models.
resources.examples: Example: Transcribe meeting audio into text + timestamps.

resources.title: ElevenLabs TTS
resources.description: High-quality text-to-speech voices with expressive output.
resources.examples: Example: Generate narration for a slide deck script.

resources.title: pydub
resources.description: Simple audio manipulation in Python (cut/trim/overlap) on top of FFmpeg.
resources.examples: Example: Split a long recording into per-speaker segments.

resources.title: CapCut
resources.description: Fast short-form editor with templates, auto-captions, and social export.
resources.examples: Example: Create a 30-second reel with auto subtitles and transitions.

resources.title: Descript
resources.description: Edit audio and video by editing the transcript text.
resources.examples: Example: Remove filler words from a podcast by deleting text.

resources.title: HeyGen
resources.description: Create talking-avatar videos with multilingual voice and lip sync.
resources.examples: Example: Produce a product intro in two languages from one script.

resources.title: Suno
resources.description: Generate songs from prompts with vocals, style, and arrangement options.
resources.examples: Example: Draft a short upbeat intro track for a tutorial series.
